# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

**Do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Email: security@voidpush.dev

We will acknowledge within 48 hours, triage within 7 days, and patch within 30 days for confirmed vulnerabilities.

Coordinated disclosure — 90-day embargo before public disclosure.

## Scope

In scope: void-cli, relay node, score engine, protocol implementation, web app.

Out of scope: third-party dependencies (report upstream), social engineering, physical attacks.

## PGP key

Available at: https://voidpush.dev/.well-known/security.txt
